## Checklist

- [ ] Tested end-to-end: `node bin/create-orbital-app.js test-project`
- [ ] New integration follows the `apply<Name>(targetDir)` pattern
- [ ] Version in `package.json` matches current `orbital-express` version
- [ ] No `template/` folder committed (we use degit, not bundled templates)
